systems.name: Apropos
systems.purpose: Core DC warehouse management system — inventory tracking, receiving, putaway, shipping, and reporting across all DC departments. The operational backbone of the distribution center.
systems.notes: Referenced in virtually every DC CSA document. Primary WMS. Boomi-connected per existing integrations knowledge.
systems.source: Multiple DC CSA docs (CFL, Receiving, QC, VAS, PBS, Hub, Put to Lights, RTV, Pallet In/Out, PIM, Shipping)

systems.name: Sort Director
systems.purpose: Dematic sorting system — routes product to correct sort locations on the conveyor/sorting line during shipping audits and put-to-light operations.
systems.users: Shipping Audits dept, Put to Lights dept
systems.notes: Part of Dematic automation suite.

systems.name: Pick Director
systems.purpose: Dematic pick guidance system — directs pick operations and supports audit workflows in the shipping department.
systems.notes: Part of Dematic automation suite.

systems.name: Dematic Put-to-Light
systems.purpose: Light-directed put-away system — guides operators to correct bin/slot locations when sorting product to store or order destinations.
systems.notes: Hardware + embedded software. Part of Dematic automation suite.

systems.name: Dematic Pick Admin
systems.purpose: Administrative interface for Dematic pick operations — manages PBS picking assignments, wave creation, and pick workflow configuration.
systems.notes: Part of Dematic automation suite.

systems.name: Cubiscan
systems.purpose: Automated dimensioning and weighing system — captures product dimensions (length/width/height) and weight for PIM data, receiving verification, and QC workflows.
systems.notes: Hardware + software. Dimension data feeds into the PIM IVR INT Dashboard and ultimately the PIM system.

systems.name: Mettler Toledo
systems.purpose: Precision weighing scales — used in QC to verify product weights against specs, and in shipping audits to verify carton weights before dispatch.
systems.notes: Industrial precision scale hardware from Mettler-Toledo International.

systems.name: Bestpack R6
systems.purpose: Automated case taping/sealing machine — seals cartons on the shipping line before dispatch.
systems.notes: Physical packaging hardware. R6 model by Bestpack.

systems.name: Extensiv
systems.purpose: 3PL warehouse management system — manages pallet-level inventory, inbound/outbound tracking, and order fulfillment for wholesale operations.
systems.notes: Used specifically for wholesale/3PL operations. Separate system from Apropos WMS. Formerly known as 3PL Central.
systems.source: DCCSA-Pallet In and Out for Wholesale Orders

systems.name: Proship
systems.purpose: Multi-carrier shipping management — handles carrier selection, shipping label generation, rate shopping, and compliance across shipping carriers.

systems.name: Stromberg
systems.purpose: Time and attendance tracking system — manages DC employee time clock, scheduling, and labor data for Count & Flow operations.
systems.notes: Referenced specifically in CFL CSA. May have broader DC or Zumiez-wide use — needs verification.

systems.name: NexGen
systems.purpose: VAS operations management system — manages value-added service workflows, task assignments, and production tracking for VAS operations.
systems.notes: Specific vendor/product details unknown — needs verification.

systems.name: CrowdTwist
systems.purpose: Loyalty program platform powering Zumiez Stash — manages customer loyalty points, rewards, program mechanics, and member activity.
systems.notes: Now an Oracle product (acquired). Powers the Zumiez Stash loyalty program.

systems.name: SalesWarp
systems.purpose: Distributed order management system — manages order routing, inventory allocation, and fulfillment logic for ecommerce orders.

systems.name: MagentoApp
systems.purpose: Ecommerce platform application — manages online store operations, product catalog, customer-facing transactions, and integrates with loyalty and order management.
systems.notes: Referenced in Stash SOP — likely zumiez.com platform. Adobe Commerce (Magento) or a custom fork.

systems.name: Power BI
systems.purpose: Business intelligence and analytics platform — dashboards, data visualization, and reporting for operational and business data across the org.
systems.users: Multiple teams — referenced in Stash SOP, likely broader enterprise use
systems.notes: Microsoft Power BI. Enterprise-wide tool extending well beyond DC.

systems.name: myCOI
systems.purpose: Certificate of insurance (COI) management — tracks, validates, and manages vendor and carrier insurance certificates for compliance.

systems.name: FineLine
systems.purpose: Product ticketing and labeling system — manages price tickets, hangtags, and vendor compliance labeling requirements.

systems.name: Radius Logistics
systems.purpose: Freight and logistics management platform — manages carrier bookings, freight costs, and inbound/outbound shipment tracking for traffic operations.
systems.notes: External logistics service provider. Details on scope and contract status unknown.
systems.source: DCCSA-Traffic (Global Logistics, Traffic, ZTC, and Expediting)

systems.name: WIP Dashboard
systems.purpose: Real-time work-in-process tracking dashboard — provides visibility into inventory currently in-transit or in-process within the DC workflow.
systems.notes: Custom internal tool. Department Owner: Paul Sumner (CFL dept).

systems.name: PIM IVR INT Dashboard
systems.purpose: PIM integration monitoring dashboard — tracks and manages the integration between Cubiscan dimensioning data and the Product Information Management system.
systems.notes: IVR INT = likely 'Inventory Integration' (unverified). Custom internal tool. Bridges physical measurement hardware to digital PIM records.

systems.name: RTV Check-in Tool
systems.purpose: Return-to-vendor receiving and documentation tool — manages check-in of merchandise being returned to vendors, tracks quantities and discrepancies.
systems.notes: Custom internal tool.

systems.name: Carton Creator
systems.purpose: Carton build-out tool for RTV shipments — automates carton packing lists, assigns box numbers, and generates documentation for vendor returns.
systems.notes: Custom internal tool.

systems.name: SIM Tool
systems.purpose: Supplier incident management — tracks and manages vendor compliance violations, chargeback disputes, and supplier incident documentation.
systems.notes: SIM = Supplier Incident Management (unverified abbreviation). Custom internal tool.

systems.name: ZTC Truck Management
systems.purpose: Zumiez Truck Company fleet management — tracks internal DC-to-store truck assignments, routes, driver schedules, and delivery timelines.
systems.notes: ZTC = Zumiez Truck Company (Zumiez's internal delivery fleet). Custom tool.
systems.source: DCCSA-Traffic (Global Logistics, Traffic, ZTC, and Expediting)

systems.name: VAS Research Tool
systems.purpose: VAS product research tool — looks up product specifications, instructions, and requirements to guide value-added service work (e.g. stickering, folding, kitting specs).
systems.notes: Custom internal tool.

systems.name: JT Data Archive
systems.purpose: Document archive and retrieval system — stores and manages historical vendor-related documentation, agreements, and data records.
systems.notes: JT = likely initials of original creator/owner (unverified). Custom internal tool.

systems.name: Chargeback Excel Tools
systems.purpose: Excel-based chargeback processing — manual calculation and tracking of vendor chargeback amounts, fines, and dispute documentation.
systems.scopeOfImprovement: Candidate for replacement — chargeback logic and dispute history should live in a managed system, not Excel.
systems.notes: Shadow IT — unmanaged Excel file(s). Data not backed up or version-controlled.

systems.name: Master Traffic Report
systems.purpose: Excel-based traffic reporting — tracks inbound shipment status, carrier performance, on-time delivery, and freight spend metrics.
systems.scopeOfImprovement: Candidate for Power BI migration — traffic data should be pulled from source systems rather than maintained manually.
systems.notes: Shadow IT — unmanaged Excel file. Single point of failure for traffic reporting.
systems.source: DCCSA-Traffic (Global Logistics, Traffic, ZTC, and Expediting)

systems.name: Priority PO Tracker
systems.purpose: Excel-based PO prioritization — manual tracking and flagging of purchase orders requiring expedited handling or special attention from traffic team.
systems.scopeOfImprovement: PO priority data should be managed in Apropos or a shared system visible to all stakeholders.
systems.notes: Shadow IT — unmanaged Excel file.
systems.source: DCCSA-Traffic (Global Logistics, Traffic, ZTC, and Expediting)

systems.name: VAS POD Employee Metrix Sheet
systems.purpose: Excel-based employee performance tracking — records individual VAS employee productivity metrics and POD (Point of Departure or Proof of Delivery) input data.
systems.notes: Shadow IT — unmanaged Excel file. POD meaning needs verification. 'Metrix' is the original spelling from the CSA doc.

systems.name: Master Vendor Commitment Spreadsheet
systems.purpose: Excel-based vendor commitment tracking — records and tracks vendor agreements, compliance commitments, delivery windows, and contractual obligations.
systems.scopeOfImprovement: Critical vendor data living outside managed systems. Risk of data loss, version conflicts, and no audit trail.
systems.notes: Shadow IT — unmanaged Excel file. High business risk: vendor commitments are legally relevant.

systems.name: PBS Grouping Sheet
systems.purpose: Excel-based PBS store grouping — determines which stores are grouped together for pick-by-store batch wave creation. Contains 'Skate Complete Grouping' logic.
systems.scopeOfImprovement: Grouping logic should be managed in Dematic Pick Admin or Apropos, not an H-drive spreadsheet.
systems.notes: Shadow IT — macro-enabled Excel file on H: drive. Path: H:\Skate\PBS\Skate Complete Grouping V.4 Update-.xlsm. Version 4 suggests long history of manual updates.

systems.name: Hub Shrink Reports
systems.purpose: Excel-based DC inventory shrink reporting — tracks PTD (Period-to-Date) and YTD (Year-to-Date) shrink results from 995 Freight Receiving, reported to management.
systems.scopeOfImprovement: Shrink reporting could be automated via Power BI pulling directly from Apropos inventory data.
systems.notes: Shadow IT — Excel-based reporting built in-house by the Hub team. An achievement per their CSA: 'Created PTD & YTD shrink reporting to drive visibility.'
